mxfile.agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 FEB

mxCell.value: MCBB 3.0 — AWS Cloud WAN Lab Architecture

AWS Network Firewall
(or 3rd Party NVA — CheckPoint / Palo Alto / Fortinet)
East-West: Prod VPC → ① C-WAN → ② send-to Inspection → ③ FW Inspects → ④ return → ⑤ Dest VPC
North-South: Prod VPC → ❶ Prod Seg → ❷ send-via Inspection → ❸ FW Inspects → ❹ return → Hybrid Seg → DXGW → On-Prem
Inbound: On-Prem → DXGW → Hybrid Seg → send-via Inspection → FW Inspects → return → Prod Seg → Prod VPC
⑤ Hybrid Segment (DXGW / VPN Landing Zone)
On-prem connectivity terminates here — traffic must traverse Inspection before reaching Prod/Non-Prod

DestinationTargetNotes
10.20.0.0/21localVPC local
0.0.0.0/0cwan-attNon-Prod, Sydney, On-p (via Inspection)

DestinationTargetNotes
10.21.0.0/21localVPC local
0.0.0.0/0cwan-att

DestinationTargetNotes
TBD (Shared Svc)localVPC local
10.20.0.0/21cwan-attProd (via segment peering)
10.21.0.0/21cwan-attNon-Prod (via segment peering)

DestinationTargetNotes
10.30.0.0/21localVPC local
0.0.0.0/0cwan-att
lab-inspection-apse2 — same pattern as us-east-1 (FW Subnet RT + C-WAN Attach RT)
E-W: ①②③④⑤ | N-S: Prod → Inspection → Hybrid → DXGW → On-Prem | Inbound: On-Prem → DXGW → Hybrid → Inspection → Prod
C-WAN Segment Route Tables (at CNE level)

SegmentPrefixAttachmentType
Prod10.20.0.0/21vpc-prod-use1propagated
Prod10.30.0.0/21vpc-prod-apse2propagated
Non-Prod10.21.0.0/21vpc-nonprod-use1propagated
Hybrid10.0.0.0/8dxgw-uspropagated
Hybrid10.0.0.0/8dxgw-apacpropagated
Shared SvcTBDvpc-shared-use1propagated
Segment isolation enforced. Hybrid segment routes (DXGW) only reachable from Prod/Non-Prod via Inspection.

Firewall Subnet Route Table
DestinationTargetNotes
10.32.0.0/22localVPC local
0.0.0.0/0NAT-GWInternet egress
10.30.0.0/21cwan-attReturn inspected traffic → C-WAN

C-WAN Attachment Subnet Route Table 1
DestinationTargetNotes

0.0.0.0.0/0vpce-fw-az-aFW endpoint
